calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Jun-15-2011 Granted Per Written Order

Petition By J. Kubota Proposed Executor, For Prior Approval Of Right To Compensation As Executor And For Services As Attorney For The Executor.
Off Calendar Dec-09-2009 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Gilbert Jay for and with Joan Kubota. Dennis Livingston for and with Walter Hughes Sr. Walter Hughes Jr. was also present.

Mr. Jay stated that the petition was being withdrawn and that he filed a Substitution of Attorney this morning. The matter was taken off calendar.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Reporter: Arlene Howell, CSR#2542. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy J. Capozzoli.

Petition By J. Kubota Proposed Executor, For Prior Approval Of Right To Compensation As Executor And For Services As Attorney For The Executor.
Off Calendar Nov-25-2009 Continued To Dec-09-09 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Petitioner/Executor Joan Kubota, Esq. present in pro per, Walter Hughes, Sr. (grandson) and Walter Hughes, Jr. (great grandson) are present in pro per.
Ms. Kubota stated that both Mr. Hughes, Sr. and Jr. Whishes to withdraw their verbal objection made on Oct. 28th hearing and not object to the new petition. Mr. Hughes, Sr. stated that he had no key to the residence and not receiving notice, in addition, he stated that don't know what is going on. The Court stated to the parties that the statute and case law is clear, the right to compensation as executor and lawyer and double compensations. With the considerations of the testimonies and statements' made at the last hearing about the changes to the will, the court is denying the petition but not prevented the parties to do it.
Matter is put over to Dec. 9, 2009 at 9:00 a.m. for status, parties to design what they wanted to do or to have legal counsel appear on the matter.
Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Arlene Howell, CSR#2542. Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha. Bailiff: Deputy J. Capozzoli.

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Oct-28-2009 Granted Per Written Order

Petition By J. Kubota Proposed Executor, For Prior Approval Of Right To Compensation As Executor And For Services As Attorney For The Executor.
Off Calendar Oct-28-2009 Continued To Nov-25-09 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Joan Kubota in Propria Persona. Walter Hughes, Sr. (Grandson). Walter Hughes, Jr. (Great Grandson). Donna Borden significant other of W. Hughes, Sr.

Mr. Hughes stated that his Grandmother told him that she wanted to take the deceased Uncle's name out of the will, list him as the sole heir and his Son was to be named in the event of his death. In addition, he stated that his Grandmother was blind and that when he read the will to his Grandmother that she stated that this was not what she wanted, that she spoke to Ms. Kubota to express her concerns and requested that the will be changed, that Ms. Kubota advised her not to change the will and that dispite numerous request by the Grandmother that Counsel would not comply. The Court advised Walter Hughes, Jr. to seek Counsel. The matter was continued to November 25, 2009 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Arlene Howell, CSR#2542. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy J. Capozzoli.
